voxy-extra.option.nether_fog.start.toolt: Controls when the fog begins to appear (start multiplier).
voxy-extra.option.nether_fog.end.tooltip: Controls how far the fog extends (end multiplier).
voxy-extra.option.flashback_copy_lods.to: Enables copying LoDs to special folder (doesn't support combining replays). If turned off, LoD location will be written to metadata instead, which can't be ingested in the replay.
voxy-extra.option.flashback_ingest.toolt: Enables ingesting in compatible Flashback replays (which have LoD copied).
voxy-extra.option.linked_servers.tooltip: Allows using a single LoD storage for multiple servers.
voxy-extra.option.server_blacklist.toolt: Allows blacklisting servers to disable Voxy on them.
voxy-extra.modal.open_editor_modal.toolt: Opens a modal screen for editing.
